title: Manage honey bee swarms
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage honey bee swarms demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to catch a swarm of honey bees

pcs.text: Assess swarm location, size and condition and determine the options for dealing with the swarm
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess swarm location, size and condition and determine the options for dealing with the swarm?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess swarm location, size and condition and determine the options for dealing with the swarm.

pcs.text: Determine equipment and resources required if catching the swarm is a viable and safe option
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine equipment and resources required if catching the swarm is a viable and safe option?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine equipment and resources required if catching the swarm is a viable and safe option.

pcs.text: Select equipment and ensure serviceable for collecting swarms
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select equipment and ensure serviceable for collecting swarms?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select equipment and ensure serviceable for collecting swarms.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks and apply appropriate controls associated with collecting a swarm
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks and apply appropriate controls associated with collecting a swarm?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks and apply appropriate controls associated with collecting a swarm.

pcs.text: Select, ensure serviceability, fit  and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, ensure serviceability, fit  and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, ensure serviceability, fit  and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Conduct work according to quarantine regulations and biosecurity codes of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct work according to quarantine regulations and biosecurity codes of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct work according to quarantine regulations and biosecurity codes of practice.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to catch a swarm of honey bees

elements.title: Collect a swarm of honey bees

pcs.text: Place foundation frames in hive box to encourage collected swarm to remain according to biosecurity code of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place foundation frames in hive box to encourage collected swarm to remain according to biosecurity code of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place foundation frames in hive box to encourage collected swarm to remain according to biosecurity code of practice.

pcs.text: Catch swarm by shaking or placing into an empty box
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Catch swarm by shaking or placing into an empty box?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Catch swarm by shaking or placing into an empty box.

pcs.text: Move boxed swarm to new location after confirming that entire swarm has been collected
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move boxed swarm to new location after confirming that entire swarm has been collected?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move boxed swarm to new location after confirming that entire swarm has been collected.

pcs.text: Quarantine swarm from apiary to monitor hive health according to biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Quarantine swarm from apiary to monitor hive health according to biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Quarantine swarm from apiary to monitor hive health according to biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor egg laying performance of queen to determine if re-queening is required according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor egg laying performance of queen to determine if re-queening is required according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor egg laying performance of queen to determine if re-queening is required according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Collect a swarm of honey bees

elements.title: Manage swarming behaviour in a honey bee colony

pcs.text: Monitor honey bee colony for signs that swarming may occur
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor honey bee colony for signs that swarming may occur?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor honey bee colony for signs that swarming may occur.

pcs.text: Consider options for controlling swarming behaviour and select and implement the best option
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider options for controlling swarming behaviour and select and implement the best option?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider options for controlling swarming behaviour and select and implement the best option.

pcs.text: Monitor colony to ensure that swarming behaviour has been managed and assess further management options
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor colony to ensure that swarming behaviour has been managed and assess further management options?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor colony to ensure that swarming behaviour has been managed and assess further management options.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Manage swarming behaviour in a honey bee colony

elements.title: Update and maintain apiary records

pcs.text: Update apiary records for increased hive numbers according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Update apiary records for increased hive numbers according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Update apiary records for increased hive numbers according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Notify authorities of amended hive numbers according to legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Notify authorities of amended hive numbers according to legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Notify authorities of amended hive numbers according to legislative and regulatory requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Update and maintain apiary records
